deliverables.name: money reckoning
deliverables.description: Saved reckoning with the retire-at-60 bottom line as the headline element above the working detail; each reconciled account figure paired with its trusted source in the same section.

deliverables.name: retirement-and-housing readiness
deliverables.description: Forward projection to age 60 (and age-58 test) with a stated growth assumption, plus a grounded affordability verdict on the Nashville-area (<=350000) and Birmingham-area (<=325000) listings against the reconciled monthly cushion versus the 825 rent baseline.
